decision-tree.root-question: Is the embed call on an interactive path (user-blocking) or offline (nightly / catchup)?

branch.conclusion: Use synchronous `embeddings.create`. Model = text-embedding-3-small, dims = 1536. Pin from config.

branch.question: Is the batch > 1000 chunks AND the 24-hour completion window acceptable?

branch.conclusion: Use Batch API. Assign meaningful `custom_id`. Correlate results by custom_id, never by order.
Use synchronous embeddings with paced concurrency. Pin model and dims from config.

branch.question: Did A/B vs text-embedding-3-large show recall@10 lift > 5%?

branch.conclusion: Switch to text-embedding-3-large; reindex the full corpus; update config.
Stay on text-embedding-3-small; cost-benefit does not justify the switch.

example.p: 10K news articles, nightly reindex, 24h OK → Batch API. custom_id = `news_{article_id}_chunk_{n}`. Conclusion r5-batch-correlation.
